headline: Monday owns your comeback: discipline now
summary: Today you skip the weekend snacking cycle and combine Huel portion control with a 35-minute row session to cut your pace gap in half.
details: Lock in Huel for three meals today and avoid all grazing—you ate emotion over hunger the past 72 hours. Row for 35 minutes this afternoon with intention: this single session closes roughly 0.2 kg of your weekly shortfall. Monday matters because you're 447 days behind; every deliberate day is a day you stop sliding backward.
